basics.name: Sepideh Mansouri
basics.label: UX/UI Designer | Junior & Internship Candidate
basics.summary: Aspiring UX/UI Designer with a background in content management and customer-facing roles, currently transitioning into digital product design. Experienced in user-centered thinking through project-based training at ReDI School of Digital Integration and independent UX projects. Skilled in designing mobile-first interfaces, improving usability, and structuring information for clarity. Strong understanding of user behavior developed through both real-world customer experience and UX design practice. Currently seeking Junior UX Designer or Internship opportunities in Berlin to further develop practical product design skills.

work.name: Action
work.summary: Assisted customers in a fast-paced retail environment; developed strong communication and problem-solving skills; gained real-world insight into user behavior and needs.
